---
applyTo: '**'
description: 'General code review standards and checkpoints for ensuring code quality, consistency, and best practices across all projects'
---

# Code Review Standards

> Code review is a collaborative process to ensure code quality, maintainability, and consistency. Focus on actual issues, not style preferences or tool false positives.
> 
> **⚠️ IMPORTANT**: This document is referenced by `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and MUST be read before performing any GitHub PR code review.
> 
> **Note**: For framework-specific code review guidance, refer to framework directories:
> - [React Code Review Standards](../react/code-review.instructions.md)

##  Code Review Summary Output Requirement

所有 GitHub PR code review，必须在 review 评论区输出如下标准化总结：

```markdown
## Code Review Summary

### 1. 必须修改的 Items

- [ ] （请填写所有必须修改项，每项简明描述问题和位置）

### 2. 建议修改的 Items

- [ ] （请填写所有建议修改项，每项简明描述优化建议和位置）

---

Powered By AI Instructions
```

## 10. Code Review Summary Output Requirement

All GitHub PR code reviews MUST include the following standardized summary in the review comment:

```markdown
## Code Review Summary

### 1. Required Changes

- [ ] (List all required changes, each with a concise description and location)

### 2. Suggested Improvements

- [ ] (List all suggested improvements, each with a concise description and location)

---

Powered By AI Instructions
```
